overview: This step performs word counts on the different parts of a set of documents. It takes filter events and sends filter events. The word counts are saved as annotations that can be used in other steps, such as the Scoping Report Step which can generate a report from the word counts. The word count generated follows the GMX-V 2.0 standard.

countInBatch.description: Set this option to get an annotation of the word count per batch. A word count annotation is always set to each text unit regardless of this setting; this option adds an additional annotation at the batch level.

countInBatchItems.description: Set this option to get an annotation of the word count per batch item. A word count annotation is always set to each text unit regardless of this setting; this option adds an additional annotation at the batch item level.

countInDocuments.description: Set this option to get an annotation of the word count per document. A word count annotation is always set to each text unit regardless of this setting; this option adds an additional annotation at the document level.

countInSubDocuments.description: Set this option to get an annotation of the word count per sub-document. A word count annotation is always set to each text unit regardless of this setting; this option adds an additional annotation at the sub-document level.

countInGroups.description: Set this option to get an annotation of the word count per group. A word count annotation is always set to each text unit regardless of this setting; this option adds an additional annotation at the group level.

bufferSize.description: Size of the text buffer used during word counting. A value of 0 indicates no buffering limit.

processingNotes: Word count annotations are always set on each text unit, regardless of the batch/document/group-level options.
The word count follows the GMX-V 2.0 standard (http://www.xtm-intl.com/manuals/gmx-v/GMX-V-2.0.html).
Word count annotations can be consumed by downstream steps such as the Scoping Report Step.
